name: Leonardo DiCaprio
abstract: Leonardo Wilhelm DiCaprio ( ; Italian: [diˈkaːprjo]; born November 11, 1974) is an American actor and film producer. Known for his work in biographical and period films, he is the recipient of numerous accolades, including an Academy Award, an Actor Award, a British Academy Film Award, an Emmy Award, a Silver Bear and three Golden Globes.

about_quotes.speaker: Burrill Crohn
about_quotes.evidence: "Whatever Happened to Gilbert Grape," Leonardo DiCaprio’s first film and as far as I’m concerned by far his best film.
about_quotes.doc_title: Burrill Crohn interviewed by Monk Rowe, Woodstock, New York, January 3, 2012
